name: cloud-event-driven-bookshelf
description: Event-driven virtual bookshelf backend built with serverless architecture using AWS services like Lambda, EventBridge, SQS, and DynamoDB.

scripts.start:gateway: bun run build:lambdas && cd ./sam && sam local start-api --template template.yml
scripts.invoke:sqs:book-registered: bun run build:lambdas && cd ./sam && sam local invoke BookRegisteredNotifyLibraryFunction -e ./events/book-registered-sqs-evt.json
scripts.invoke:sqs:loan-registered: bun run build:lambdas && cd ./sam && sam local invoke NotifyLibraryLoanRegisteredFunction -e ./events/loan-registered-sqs-evt.json
scripts.invoke:sqs:loan-returned: bun run build:lambdas && cd ./sam && sam local invoke NotifyLibraryLoanReturnedFunction -e ./events/loan-returned-sqs-evt.json
scripts.invoke:sqs:analyze-demand: bun run build:lambdas && cd ./sam && sam local invoke AnalyzeDemandLoanRegisteredFunction -e ./events/loan-registered-sqs-evt.json
